derived.causal_summary: Sub-phase 002 of the Search Intelligence Stress-Test Playbook. Execution scaffold consuming 001's dispatch matrix and scripts. Defines a 4-stage flow: pre-flight (verify CLIs + auth + DB snapshot + CocoIndex daemon), dispatch (loop 9 scenarios × 3 CLIs + ablation cells), manual scoring (operator fills score.md per cell using 001 rubric), aggregation (synthesize findings.md with cross-CLI comparison + top wins/failures + 005-defect cross-references + recommendations). Concurrency: serial for cli-codex and cli-opencode; max 3 concurrent for cli-copilot per repo Phase 018 convention. Idempotency via run-folder existence check enables resume mid-sweep. Per-run artifacts capture prompt + output + meta.json (latency, tokens, model, exit_code, db_snapshot_hash) + score.md per 001 output schema. Manual scoring is operator-time-bound (~5 min/cell × 27 cells ≈ 2-3 hours); auto-scoring deferred to v2. Aggregation requires human judgment for cross-CLI insight; finishings.md template provides skeleton with required sections. Actual execution deferred to a dedicated session; this packet defines the contract.
